headline: 1 Cash-Heavy Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Find Risky
summary: A surplus of cash can mean financial stability, but it can also indicate a reluctance (or inability) to invest in growth. Some of these companies also face challenges like stagnating revenue, declining market share, or limited scalability.

headline: DOCS Teams Up With Aledade to Bring Clinical AI to Value-Based Care
summary: Doximity teams with Aledade to bring AI-powered documentation and clinical search tools into physician workflows and value-based care settings.
